name: Revenge from the Past
original_name: พิษรักรอยอดีต
overview: Phing is a chubby, cute, good-hearted young woman who was killed when Foei and Nisa plotted to have Foei seduce and marry Phing for her fortune. Only she didn't stay dead, she was revived and transformed herself into a thin and beautiful woman so she could take revenge.  Cho is the kind son of a noodle shop owner, who secretly likes Phing but never got up the courage to tell her... until she had died. Heartbroken that he never told her how he felt, he decided that if he was given another chance at love he wouldn't hesitate to tell her his feelings, and along comes May.

trailers.title: [OFFICIAL TRAILER] ละครใหม่! “พิษรักรอยอดีต” | เริ่ม 21 มี.ค. 65 | one31
